title: Harringtons Complete Dry Adult Dog Food Turkey & Veg 15kg - Made with All Natural Ingredients (Packaging may vary)
features: MEAT IS OUR FIRST PRIORITY - Our recipes are made with freshly prepared, quality animal protein, providing a key source of nutrients to help give your dog everything they need to be healthy and happy.
QUALITY NATURAL INGREDIENTS - Our tasty nuggets of natural nutrition are made with freshly prepared meat and vegetable ingredients that meet human food standards. Nothing hidden, no compromises.
SUPPORTS GUT HEALTH - Enriched with prebiotics and yucca, plant fibres help support digestion and contribute to a healthy gut environment, aiding immunity and nutrient absorption.
MAINTAINS SKIN & COAT - Our unique blend of omega 3 and 6 helps keep coats healthy and glossy, while also supporting brain, eye and heart function.
FRESHCOOK - We add a delicious homemade chicken gravy both inside and on the outside of our kibble, making every bowl even tastier.

specifications_table.Special Features: Premium diet, natural ingredients, no artificial additives, digestive health, natural sources of vitamins and minerals
specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: For dogs with digestive problems or a sensitive stomach

product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: COMPOSITION Turkey and Meat Meals 26% (Dried Turkey 6.5%*) Maize Barley Rice (14%) Freshly Prepared Chicken (4%) Peas (4%) Poultry Fat Beet Pulp Linseed Salmon Oil (1%) Minerals Poultry Gravy (0.5%) Seaweed (0.1%) FOS (0.1%) Yucca Extract (0.01%) *6.5% Dried Turkey, equivalent to 26g Turkey in every 100g Kibble ADDITIVES (PER KG) Vitamin A 15,000 iu Vitamin D3 1500 iu Vitamin E 150mg Trace Elements: Zinc (Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate) 75mg Iron (Iron Sulphate Monohydrate) 50mg Manganese (Manganous (II) Oxide) 50mg Copper (Copper (II) Sulphate Pentahydrate) 5mg Iodine (Calcium Iodate Anhydrous) 0.5mg Selenium (Sodium Selenite) 0.1mg Antioxidants (tocopherol rich extracts - natural antioxidant) ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS Protein 21% Fat Content 10% Crude Fibre 3% Crude Ash 8.5% Omega 6 1.9% Omega 3 0.9%
